channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
item.description: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

item.title: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
item.description: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted about 6,000 pages related to energy conservation as a historic heatwave tears across the country. The deletion was suspiciously timed, following Republican outrage over Mayor Zohran Mamdani asking New Yorkers to help reduce strain on the grid by setting their AC to 78 degrees. Republicans like Ted Cruz […]...

item.title: Argentina vs Scotland Free Streams: How to watch Nations Championship 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Argentina vs Scotland live streams online – including for FREE – as the Pumas host the Scots in their Nations Championship 2026 opener.

item.title: NASA mission to rescue the falling Swift observatory has launched
item.description: NASA has made contact with LINK, the robotic spacecraft made for the Swift Boost mission.

item.title: Submit Your Questions: Inside The World of Online Romance Scams
item.description: The Yahoo Boys author Carlos Barragán will join Kate Knibbs to answer your questions about Nigeria's romance scammers.

item.title: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
item.description: The Matic is our favorite robot vacuum by a pretty comfortable margin. If you’ve been thinking about buying one, you may want to plan on doing it sooner than later. The company will raise its price by $250 on September 9th, going from $1,245 to $1,495. Matic told The Verge that the new price reflects […]

item.title: Anthropic launches "AI workbench" for scientists using Claude
item.description: Anthropic says Claude Science will let scientists consolidate tools and data within a single secure environment.

item.title: ‘In some jobs, they want to be replaced’: Chinese robotics company Agibot says humanoids could take over ‘dangerous’ jobs — and one day even teach children
item.description: At Agibot's UK launch event, an executive for the Chinese company spoke on its bold vision for the future of work.

item.title: I’ve used the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 for a year — these are the 4 upgrades I’m hoping to see from the Z Fold 8, and one change I hope doesn’t happen
item.description: Samsung's Z Fold 7 is almost a year old. As someone who uses it every day, here are the changes I hope to see.

item.title: 'How do you mix over 1,000 audio tracks from inside a ride vehicle?' — how Disney Imagineering produced and mixed the soundtrack for Soarin’ Across America, and why it stands out
item.description: In an interview, Disney Imagineering explains how it rethought the audio production process for Soarin’ Across America by bringing the mixing console into the ride vehicle.

item.title: Nous avons testé la 8BitDo Ultimate 2 Bluetooth : une excellente manette pour Switch 2 mais décevant sur PC
item.description: Est-ce la manette ultime selon 8BitDo ? Avril 2025, le constructeur chinois lançait la Ultimate 2, l'un de ses porte-étendards, souvent considéré comme la meilleure alternative à la manette Pro de la Switch 2. Mais peu importe le support, cette manette a des allures de pro, et ce pour un tarif contenu.

item.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
item.description: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

item.title: Tesla driver charged with manslaughter for Texas crash that killed a woman in her home
item.description: The incident is also being investigated by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

item.title: Only these iPhone models are getting the new Siri AI this fall
item.description: Some Apple devices are about to get much more intelligent, while others are getting left behind.

item.title: Des écouteurs Xiaomi à moins de 20 € avec 2 mois de Spotify Premium offerts ? C’est le super deal du jour
item.description: Les Xiaomi Redmi Buds 8 Active sont des écouteurs d'entrée de gamme à un prix abordable, renforcé par une réduction de 32 % à retrouver sur Amazon.
